tasks.label: Run Zendesk Backup (macOS -> KB raw)
args:
set -euo pipefail
RAW_DIR="/Users/angusmclauchlan/Projects/itsolver/itsolver-toolkit/itsolver-kb/raw"
export BACKUP_PATH="$RAW_DIR"
python3 "${workspaceFolder}/backup_zendesk_all.py"
LATEST_ZIP=$(ls -t "$RAW_DIR"/zendesk_backup_*.zip 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$LATEST_ZIP" ]; then
  echo "No backup zip found in $RAW_DIR" >&2
  exit 1
fi
EXTRACT_DIR="${LATEST_ZIP%.zip}"
rm -rf "$EXTRACT_DIR"
mkdir -p "$EXTRACT_DIR"
ditto -x -k "$LATEST_ZIP" "$EXTRACT_DIR"
rm "$LATEST_ZIP"
echo "Extracted backup to $EXTRACT_DIR"
